appsearch.name: appsearch
appsearch.description: Search for Android apps on F-Droid or GitHub
appsearch.query_required: Please provide an app name to search for.

appcheck.name: appcheck
appcheck.description: Check if an app or game is available on Mobile, PC, or Console
appcheck.query_required: Please provide a name or Store URL.
appcheck.searching: 🔍 Scanning major storefronts across PC, Mobile, and Console...
appcheck.no_results: No official store links found for "{query}".

monitorapps.name: monitorapps
monitorapps.description: Send and monitor top trending apps in a specific channel
monitorapps.start_success: ✅ Successfully started monitoring in {channel}. A trending list has been sent.
monitorapps.embed_desc: This list is automatically updated every 24 hours.

help.name: help
help.description: Displays a list of all available commands
help.title: Bot Command Guide
help.desc_text:
Use the `!` prefix before typing a command.
Here is a list of available features:

about.name: about
about.title: About OpenZero
about.desc: OpenZero is a modular research and server management assistant.
about.field_dev_value: **!full** moderation, **!ticket** systems with MongoDB, **!purge**, and **!nerdfont** search.
about.field_tech_value: Built with **Node.js**, **Python (Flask)**, and **MongoDB** with multi-AI support.
about.footer: OpenZero Project • Open Data & Smart Automation

language.name: language
language.invalid: Invalid language. Use `!language list` to see the list.
language.set_prompt: Please provide a language name. Example: `!language set English (US)`
language.auto_prompt: Please provide text to detect. Example: `!language auto Hello, how are you?`
language.usage_hint: Use `!language set <language name>`, `!language list`, or `!language auto <text>`.

wikipedia.description: Search for information on Wikipedia with a cool interface

arxiv.description: Search for scientific papers on arXiv

nerdfont.query_required: Please provide a font name to search. Example: `!nf jetbrains`.

openlibrary.description: Search for books on Open Library
openlibrary.query_required: Please provide a book title to search. Example: `!openlibrary The Lord of the Rings`
openlibrary.author: Author
openlibrary.subject: Subject

product.description: Search for products using AI recommendations
product.query_required: Please provide a product name to search.

gettutorial.description: Get tutorials from GitHub Resource repository using AI.
gettutorial.no_tutorials: No tutorials available at this time.
gettutorial.ai_found: AI found the most relevant tutorial: **{file}**
gettutorial.no_relevant: Sorry, AI found no relevant tutorial for query: "{query}".
gettutorial.ai_limit: Sorry, the library staff are currently on break (AI Limit).
gettutorial.no_found_repo: No tutorials found in the repository.
gettutorial.choose_list: Use `!tutorial <query>` for AI search, or choose from the list:

kick.description: Kicks a member from the server
kick.no_perms: You do not have `Kick Members` permission.
kick.mention: Mention (@mention) the member you want to kick.

ban.description: Bans a member from the server
ban.no_perms: You do not have `Ban Members` permission.
ban.mention: Mention (@mention) the member you want to ban.

clear.description: Deletes a specified number of messages
clear.no_perms: You need `Manage Messages` permission to delete messages.

purge.description: Delete a specified number of messages (Default: 99)
purge.no_perms: You need `Manage Messages` permission to use this command.

ticket.setup_desc: Click the button below to create a private support ticket.
ticket.already_exists: You already have an open ticket: {channel}
ticket.created_msg: Hello {user}, welcome to your ticket! Please describe your issue.
ticket.no_perms_setup: You need `Administrator` permission to setup the ticket system.

webhook.invalid_channel: Please mention a valid text channel.
webhook.invalid_url: Please provide a valid image URL for the profile picture.

fda.description: Search for products in the FDA database (Drugs, Food, Devices)
fda.query_required: Please provide a search keyword. Example: `!fda drug tylenol`.
fda.no_results: No results found for "{query}" in category {category}.

restart.description: Restart the Bot and API (Admin only)
restart.bot_success: ✅ Bot Service restart triggered. See you soon!
restart.railway_not_configured: ⚠️ Railway API not configured. Restarting bot locally...

weather.name: weather
weather.description: Check the weather for a city or coordinates

gif.name: gif
gif.description: Search for AI-optimized GIFs or see trending ones
gif.query_required: Please provide a search keyword for the GIF.
gif.searching: Optimizing search with AI and fetching GIF...
gif.api_error: Failed to fetch GIF from the server.
